mapper.sql: s.id, s.product_id, s.sku_code, s.sku_name, s.specs_json, s.sale_price, s.on_hand_quantity, s.reserved_quantity, s.enabled, p.name AS product_name

o.id, o.user_id, o.status, o.currency, o.item_amount, o.shipping_amount, o.payable_amount, o.payment_expires_at, o.created_at, o.paid_at, o.shipped_at, o.received_at, o.cancelled_at, o.closed_at, sh.carrier, sh.tracking_number
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product_skus s JOIN products p ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE s.product_id = #{productId} AND s.enabled = TRUE ORDER BY s.sale_price, s.id
SELECT FROM product_skus s JOIN products p ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE s.id = #{skuId}
SELECT FROM product_skus s JOIN products p ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE s.id IN #{id} ORDER BY s.id FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE product_skus SET reserved_quantity = reserved_quantity + #{quantity}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{skuId} AND enabled = TRUE AND on_hand_quantity - reserved_quantity >= #{quantity}
UPDATE product_skus SET reserved_quantity = reserved_quantity - #{quantity}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{skuId} AND reserved_quantity >= #{quantity}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO commerce_orders (id, user_id, status, currency, item_amount, shipping_amount, payable_amount, payment_expires_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, 'PENDING_PAYMENT', 'CNY', #{itemAmount}, 0, #{itemAmount}, #{paymentExpiresAt})

INSERT INTO commerce_order_items (id, order_id, product_id, sku_id, product_name_snapshot, sku_name_snapshot, specs_snapshot, unit_price, quantity, subtotal) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{sku.productId}, #{sku.id}, #{sku.productName}, #{sku.skuName}, CAST(#{sku.specsJson} AS JSON), #{sku.salePrice}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal})

INSERT INTO order_address_snapshots (order_id, recipient_name, recipient_phone, province, city, district, address_line) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{recipientName}, #{recipientPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{addressLine})
INSERT INTO commerce_order_history (id, order_id, from_status, to_status, reason) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{reason})

INSERT INTO stock_movements (id, operation_id, sku_id, order_id, order_item_id, movement_type, quantity, on_hand_after, reserved_after, reason) VALUES (#{id}, #{operationId}, #{skuId}, #{orderId}, #{orderItemId}, #{movementType}, #{quantity}, #{onHandAfter}, #{reservedAfter}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM commerce_orders o LEFT JOIN shipments sh ON sh.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}
SELECT FROM commerce_orders o LEFT JOIN shipments sh ON sh.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, order_id, product_id, sku_id, product_name_snapshot, sku_name_snapshot, specs_snapshot, unit_price, quantity, subtotal FROM commerce_order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commerce_orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT id, user_id FROM commerce_orders WHERE status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND payment_expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) ORDER BY payment_expires_at, id LIMIT #{batchSize} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE commerce_orders SET status = 'PAID', paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND payment_expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
UPDATE commerce_orders SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT'
UPDATE commerce_orders SET status = 'CLOSED', closed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND payment_expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
UPDATE commerce_orders SET status = 'SHIPPED', shipped_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PAID'
UPDATE commerce_orders SET status = 'RECEIVED', received_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'SHIPPED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (id, order_id, payment_no, provider, status, amount, paid_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{paymentNo}, 'MOCK', 'SUCCEEDED', #{amount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6))
INSERT INTO shipments (id, order_id, carrier, tracking_number, shipped_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{carrier}, #{trackingNumber}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6))
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM products WHERE id = #{productId} AND enabled = TRUE)

SELECT oi.id AS order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, o.user_id FROM commerce_order_items oi JOIN commerce_orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN commerce_product_reviews r ON r.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND oi.product_id = #{productId} AND o.status = 'RECEIVED' AND r.id IS NULL ORDER BY o.received_at, oi.id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO commerce_product_reviews (id, product_id, order_item_id, user_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{id}, #{productId}, #{orderItemId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.product_id, r.order_item_id, r.user_id, r.rating, r.content, u.nickname AS reviewer_name, r.created_at FROM commerce_product_reviews r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.id = #{reviewId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commerce_product_reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM commerce_product_reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO store_idempotency (id, user_id, endpoint, idempotency_key, request_digest, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{endpoint}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{requestDigest}, 'PROCESSING')
mapper.select: SELECT id, request_digest, status, response_http_status, response_body, resource_id FROM store_idempotency WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND endpoint = #{endpoint} AND idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE store_idempotency SET status = 'COMPLETED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_body = CAST(#{responseBody} AS JSON), resource_id = #{resourceId}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE store_idempotency SET status = 'FAILED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_body = CAST(#{responseBody} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'
